name: an option key with no explicit flag mapping projects via a generic flag, so any tool option is providable
command: f=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runners/emit-tool-config.sh" --tool trivy --options '{"scanners":"vuln,secret"}' --out . 2>/dev/null); printf '%s' "$f" | grep -q -- '--scanners vuln,secret' && echo generic-flag-fallback 1>&2
